fixes: Fixed a minor issue with the focus styles on the new item form - they should now look consistent across all browsers and platforms.

changes.description: Big one! Copy-Pasta just left the browser. Control your snippets from a physical Stream Deck key, share anything with a single link, and enjoy a refreshed look across the whole app.
news: Stream Deck integration - assign any snippet to a physical key and copy it without ever touching your mouse.
Share link - generate a link to share any clipboard item instantly with anyone.
updates: Private mode got a glow-up - hidden text is now even more discreet and visually polished.
Swapped out all icons for a new set that feels more consistent and cohesive throughout the app.
Keyboard navigation looks better than ever with improved focus styles across the board.
fixes: Fixed an issue where the share link would generate the wrong URL depending on your environment.
Fixed a sneaky bug where importing data could silently fail in some edge cases.

updates: Under-the-hood compatibility and security updates - nothing to see here, just keeping things safe and smooth.

changes.description:
Ok yes, it's been a while. I missed you too. 👋

This update brings a long-awaited export feature so you can finally back up and move your data around freely. Plus a handful of improvements and fixes along the way :
news:
You can now export and import all your data as a JSON file - perfect for backups or switching devices.
(Look for the link in the footer, it's right there waiting for you.)
updates: Focus styles got a serious upgrade - try pressing Tab and navigating with your keyboard, it actually looks great now.

Changelog descriptions can now be multiline, so I can finally write proper notes for each update instead of cramming everything into one line.

Like this one for example :)

Or even this one :D

Cool right?

Ok I will stop now.
fixes: Fixed the border color in dark mode on the new item form - it was bothering me too.

changes.description: A small but handy update with a few things that were missing :
news: Added a one-click button to copy every item in a group at once - great for batch workflows.
fixes: Resized all the action buttons on clipboard cards so they feel more balanced.
Groups now remember whether they were open or collapsed - even after you refresh the page.

changes.description:
The biggest update yet. Copy-Pasta now supports groups, so you can finally bring some order to your snippet chaos.
Organize, reorder, and manage your items like a pro :
news: Create groups to organize your clipboard items the way you actually think.
Drag and reorder your groups however you like.
Significant performance improvements for a snappier experience all around.
updates: Added a confirmation dialog before deleting a group - no more accidental wipes.
fixes: Fixed a bug that stacked duplicated items into multiple rows instead of handling them cleanly.
Fixed clipboard items not displaying correctly in certain situations.

changes.description: A quick patch to squash a couple of annoying bugs :
fixes: Fixed a bug when creating an item that already exists - duplicate or replace now works as expected.
Fixed a crash when trying to delete an archived item.

changes.description: This update introduces an archive system - your items are now safe before they're gone for good :
news: Toast notifications now confirm every action - create, update, archive, delete. You'll always know what just happened.
Items now go to an archive before being permanently deleted - no more accidental losses.
Added analytics to better understand how the app is used and keep improving it.
updates: Added a link to the archive page in the footer so it's always one click away.
fixes: Fixed the missing active state on footer links - they now highlight properly when selected.

changes.description: A fresh new page and a better footer to tie everything together :
news: Added a contact page - say hi, report a bug, or just show some love. Email, LinkedIn, and GitHub are all there.
updates: Redesigned the footer with useful links and a dedicated changelog section - much easier to navigate.
fixes: Fixed a frustrating issue where you had to select the text inside a card instead of just clicking it to copy.
Smoothed out the copy animation for a more satisfying experience.

changes.description: A visual refresh to make things cleaner and easier on the eyes :
updates: The header has a new look - cleaner, more modern, more Copy-Pasta.
Clipboard cards got a redesign too - better readability, better feel.

changes.description: Two new features that make the app a lot more intuitive to use :
news: Drag and drop is here - reorder your clipboard cards however you want, effortlessly.
Added a proper 404 page so getting lost actually feels intentional.
updates: The delete button is now clearly destructive - red, bold, and impossible to miss.

changes.description: It's alive. Welcome to Copy-Pasta - your new home for clipboard snippets.
news: The first official version is live with all the core features ready to go.
